title: United Scientific Supplies JMD050 Mortar and Pestle, Deep Form, 50 ml
description:
Country Of Origin: India
Model Number: JMD050
Item Package Dimension: 3.899999996022" L x 3.799999996124" W x 2.99999999694" H
Item Package Weight: 0.4 lb
reviews_5s:
Needed a pill crusher for Mom’s meds. Wanted something small and that I might also use for crushing herbs and spices. I’ve used a pestle and mortar before and much prefer them to little designated pill crushers.
It’s small, looks dainty but is quite sturdy and most importantly it does a great job of crushing everything that fits. Crush as fine or as coarse as you wish. Super easy cleanup to.I loved the quality of the product. It felt good to work with it. Small for small jobs and nice and heavy, solid and deep. I used it to grind up my little furr babies meds. It was the only way I could get meds in her, lol. It was the perfect size and the quality was incredible. I ordered another one for a back-up. I did not want to have to use one of my larger ones, so I made sure I was going to always have one for her meds. I have since had to let my baby girl go, so she could be free of pain and suffering. I know she is in a better place, now. They are like our children. She went everywhere with me and I carried her in my Coach bag so she would feel secure and safe. She loved to travel with me, where ever I was going. My "Little Bit", my buddy in crime. I miss her every day.This is the perfect simple little mortar & pestle for the price. Like another reviewer, I needed to feed a cat bits of pills. Shoving those bits down his throat had become too dangerous for my fingers. Besides, cat is an excellent liar - he did all the things the vet explained he’d do to make me think he was swallowing his pill crumb but later I found them all spat out in the corner of a closet - he was just pretending to swallow. If you can’t beat ‘em, outsmart ‘em. Cut pill into needed size, grind up needed bit, mix with tuna and tuna water, cat inhales tuna with pill dust before noticing anything suspicious. Fortunately computer is fingerprint-protected so he couldn’t break in to see I’d ordered this useful, sneaky little tool. Looks cute on kitchen shelf too.Sturdy small mortar and pestle with nice texture inside to assist with grinding. I use it to grind fish food flakes for my tiny aquarium fish.I needed something to crush hard pills, for myself and our dog. This little item is perfect! Can tuck it away for quick access. Crushing hard tablets is easy. It's also easy to clean. It's great!I have to be careful putting anything in my body these days and I missed having some spices. This works. It is small but then I’m not a chef.The logo is not printed well. Maybe i got a bad one. The quality is there mostly. Not nuclear laboratory quality, But I can't complain, works great and price is right.This is a well made and designed little mortar and pestle. Also, considering that it is porcelain, quite resilient; I dropped it and it did not even chip. All for a very reasonable price.I LOVE THE FACT THAT I CAN GET POWDER
MUCH BETTER THAN ANY PILL CRUSHER YOU TWIST TO CRUSH PILLS GOOD VALUE USE IT OFTEN MAKES GIVING MEDS TO DOG SO MUCH EASIERI am really satisfied with this delightful item, and I love that it's for scientific purposes - as well as sidelining in the kitchen! Of the various sizes this company offers, 50ml is perfect for the smaller amounts of herbs & spices that I use, and it fits nicely in my hand. The quality is top-notch, and in case I want to fire up my oven to 1000* C, I know I can count on this little item to make it through unscathed!
reviews_1s: It’s a toy, too small to be used. Money waste.
